summary: Both count builders contain an identical SQL expression that builds the `select count(*)` query. Extract that into one exported `buildCountQuery` helper and have each site's static method return its result.
rationale: The only varying piece of the duplicated SQL construction is `source`/`filters`, so a single `buildCountQuery(source, filters)` helper captures it while each static method keeps returning the same `SQL<number>` value and all surrounding signatures stay intact.
